enriched_apps.name: Mux
enriched_apps.capabilities: Video API platform for ingestion, encoding, optimization, and delivery for live and on-demand streaming. Features include thumbnail/GIF generation, clips, storyboards, auto captions, transcription, AI moderation, and audio handling.

enriched_apps.name: n8n
enriched_apps.capabilities: Workflow automation platform with REST API for programmatic task management including authentication, pagination, API playground, and endpoint reference.

enriched_apps.name: Neon
enriched_apps.capabilities: Serverless Postgres platform with APIs for project management, fleet scaling, quota controls, and Data API for querying over HTTP with browser/edge compatibility.

enriched_apps.name: Netlify
enriched_apps.capabilities: REST API for managing atomic deploys, form submissions, JavaScript snippet injection, DNS management, and workflow automation.

enriched_apps.name: New Relic
enriched_apps.capabilities: Observability APIs including REST API, NerdGraph (GraphQL), and ingest APIs for metrics, events, logs, and traces. Supports data sending, retrieval, and configuration.

enriched_apps.name: Novu
enriched_apps.capabilities: Open-source notification infrastructure API for multi-channel notifications (in-app, email, push, SMS, chat) with workflow customization and automation.

enriched_apps.name: Okta
enriched_apps.capabilities: Identity platform API for user authentication, sign-in, and programmatic management of users, apps, sessions, policies, and device identities.

enriched_apps.name: Paddle
enriched_apps.capabilities: REST API for subscription billing, payment management, and integration with CRM, ERP, and accounting solutions.

enriched_apps.name: Perplexity
enriched_apps.capabilities: AI search API providing real-time ranked web search results with domain filtering, multi-query search, content extraction, and structured responses.

enriched_apps.name: Pinecone
enriched_apps.capabilities: Vector database APIs for storing/querying records and generating embeddings with reranking via Inference API.

enriched_apps.name: Pipedrive
enriched_apps.capabilities: RESTful CRM API for integration, data sharing, real-time webhooks, and custom functionality via app extensions.

enriched_apps.name: Plaid
enriched_apps.capabilities: Financial services API for accessing consumer-permissioned data including accounts, balances, transactions, payments, and identity verification.

enriched_apps.name: Postmark
enriched_apps.capabilities: Email delivery API for single and batch emails (up to 500), domain/template management, statistics, inbound processing, and open/link tracking.

enriched_apps.name: Pusher
enriched_apps.capabilities: Real-time pub/sub messaging API for triggering events on channels, managing channels, and querying application state.

enriched_apps.name: Qdrant
enriched_apps.capabilities: Vector database REST/gRPC APIs for storing, searching, and managing vectors with payloads, collections, and snapshots.

enriched_apps.name: Readwise
enriched_apps.capabilities: Reader API for saving, fetching, updating, and deleting documents with tag management.

enriched_apps.name: Reddit
enriched_apps.capabilities: REST API for reading/writing posts, comments, upvotes, data retrieval from communities and user profiles, and moderation tools.

enriched_apps.name: Render
enriched_apps.capabilities: REST API for managing services, datastores, deploys, environments, blueprints, metrics, logs, domains, jobs, and audit logs.

enriched_apps.name: Replicate
enriched_apps.capabilities: Cloud API for running AI models without infrastructure management. Supports published, fine-tuned, and custom models for image, audio, and text tasks.

enriched_apps.name: Retool
enriched_apps.capabilities: REST API for programmatic organization management including users and resource configurations.

enriched_apps.name: Salesforce
enriched_apps.capabilities: CRM APIs for accessing data without UI, enabling operations, integration, and data manipulation through HTTP requests.

enriched_apps.name: Segment
enriched_apps.capabilities: Public API for workspace management with CRUD operations on Sources, Destinations, Warehouses, and Tracking Plans.

enriched_apps.name: SendGrid
enriched_apps.capabilities: Email API for sending at scale with RESTful APIs/SMTP, dynamic templates, real-time analytics, and security features.

enriched_apps.name: Shortcut
enriched_apps.capabilities: REST API for workspace data control, custom integrations, and workflow automation.

enriched_apps.name: Snyk
enriched_apps.capabilities: Security platform API for programmatic integration, workflow automation, and API/web application testing (DAST).

enriched_apps.name: Spotify
enriched_apps.capabilities: Web API for retrieving metadata, managing playlists, controlling playback, searching content, and accessing artist/album/show data.

enriched_apps.name: Square
enriched_apps.capabilities: Commerce APIs for managing payments, orders, inventory, customer data, and money movement across online/in-person/in-app channels.

enriched_apps.name: Stability AI
enriched_apps.capabilities: Image generation API with text-to-image (Stable Image Ultra/Core, SD 3.5), upscaling, inpainting, outpainting, background removal, and style transfer.

enriched_apps.name: Statsig
enriched_apps.capabilities: Feature flags HTTP API for real-time feature control, gradual rollouts, dynamic configuration, and personalized experiences.

enriched_apps.name: Stream
enriched_apps.capabilities: Chat and Activity Feeds APIs with SDKs for real-time chat experiences, social feeds, and customizable UI components.

enriched_apps.name: Stytch
enriched_apps.capabilities: REST authentication API with magic links, passwords, OTP, OAuth, and B2B SaaS authentication support.

enriched_apps.name: Tavily
enriched_apps.capabilities: AI search API optimized for LLMs with real-time search, extraction, crawling, mapping, and research endpoints.

enriched_apps.name: Telegram
enriched_apps.capabilities: Bot API for message-based interfaces, TDLib for custom clients, and Gateway API for verification codes.

enriched_apps.name: Temporal
enriched_apps.capabilities: WorkflowService API for starting, querying, signaling, resetting, terminating, and listing workflow executions and activity tasks.

enriched_apps.name: Todoist
enriched_apps.capabilities: Task management API for creating, updating, deleting, completing tasks, managing projects/labels/filters, comments, reminders, and webhooks.

enriched_apps.name: Together AI
enriched_apps.capabilities: Scalable inference API for 200+ open-source models with OpenAI compatibility, streaming, function calling, JSON mode, and batch processing.

enriched_apps.name: Trello
enriched_apps.capabilities: REST API for interacting with boards, cards, lists, automating tasks, and creating custom Power-Ups.

enriched_apps.name: Trigger.dev
enriched_apps.capabilities: Background jobs API for triggering tasks by identifier with JSON payloads, queuing, retries, and observability.

enriched_apps.name: Turso
enriched_apps.capabilities: Edge database REST API for managing databases, branching, point-in-time recovery, and SQL operations via libSQL protocol.

enriched_apps.name: Twitch
enriched_apps.capabilities: API for managing commercials, clips, analytics, streams, subscriptions, and real-time events via EventSub with OAuth 2.0.

enriched_apps.name: Ulysses
enriched_apps.capabilities: X-callback URL scheme for creating sheets/groups, inserting text, managing attachments/keywords, and retrieving content.

enriched_apps.name: Unit
enriched_apps.capabilities: Banking infrastructure API for creating financial products including accounts, cards, payments, and customer data management.

enriched_apps.name: Unsplash
enriched_apps.capabilities: Photo API for searching, retrieving random/new photos, collections, topics, user profiles, and dynamic image manipulation.

enriched_apps.name: Upstash
enriched_apps.capabilities: Serverless data REST API supporting Redis commands for strings, hashes, lists, sets, sorted sets, JSON, and streams over HTTP.

enriched_apps.name: Vanta
enriched_apps.capabilities: Security compliance REST API for automating evidence collection, user/resource management, data extraction, and building integrations.

enriched_apps.name: Vimeo
enriched_apps.capabilities: Video API for flexible, high-quality video integration with custom applications.

enriched_apps.name: Vonage
enriched_apps.capabilities: Communications APIs for voice, video, messaging (SMS, RCS, WhatsApp), AI-powered interactions, and authentication/fraud protection.

enriched_apps.name: Weaviate
enriched_apps.capabilities: Vector database APIs including RESTful for management, GraphQL for semantic/hybrid search, and gRPC for high-performance operations.

enriched_apps.name: Webflow
enriched_apps.capabilities: Data, Designer, and Browser APIs for creating, managing, and automating content, design, and user workflows.

enriched_apps.name: Weights & Biases
enriched_apps.capabilities: Public API for querying, exporting, and updating ML experiment data including runs, artifacts, and sweeps.

enriched_apps.name: Wise
enriched_apps.capabilities: Platform API for cross-border payments, multi-currency accounts, exchange rates, transfer management, and reconciliation.

enriched_apps.name: WooCommerce
enriched_apps.capabilities: REST API for reading/writing orders, products, coupons, customers, and shipping zones.

enriched_apps.name: WorkOS
enriched_apps.capabilities: Enterprise identity REST API for AuthKit user management, Single Sign-On, Directory Sync, and Audit Logs.

enriched_apps.name: X (Twitter)
enriched_apps.capabilities: API for posts, users, Spaces, DMs, Lists, Trends with real-time streaming, full-archive search, and engagement metrics.

enriched_apps.name: Xata
enriched_apps.capabilities: Serverless database REST API for data management, file handling, environments, fast search, and AI vector embeddings.

enriched_apps.name: Xero
enriched_apps.capabilities: Accounting API for managing accounts, transactions, attachments with SDKs and integration tools.

enriched_apps.name: YouTube
enriched_apps.capabilities: Data API for uploading videos, managing playlists, updating channels, searching content with OAuth/API key authentication.

enriched_apps.name: Zendesk
enriched_apps.capabilities: Customer service APIs for ticketing, help center, live chat, voice, sales CRM, AI agents, messaging, and custom data.

enriched_apps.name: Zoho CRM
enriched_apps.capabilities: CRM APIs including REST for CRUD, Bulk API for large data, Notification API for changes, Query API with COQL, and GraphQL.

enriched_apps.name: Jira
enriched_apps.capabilities: REST API for issues, projects, users with resource expansion, pagination, and Atlassian Document Format support.

enriched_apps.name: GitLab
enriched_apps.capabilities: REST API for automation, CI/CD management, user access control, project manipulation, and custom integrations.

enriched_apps.name: Intercom
enriched_apps.capabilities: Customer messaging API for retrieving/updating account data, SDKs, and enhanced messaging with multiple recipients.

enriched_apps.name: Mailchimp
enriched_apps.capabilities: Marketing API for audience management, campaign analytics, automation workflows, contact sync, and custom data integration.

enriched_apps.name: Mailgun
enriched_apps.capabilities: Transactional email API for sending, receiving, tracking emails with domain management, webhooks, and inbound routing.

enriched_apps.name: Monday.com
enriched_apps.capabilities: GraphQL API for workflow interaction, process automation, and read/write operations on boards, items, columns, and users.

enriched_apps.name: Miro
enriched_apps.capabilities: REST API for boards, members, items (cards, text) with CRUD operations, connectors, and experimental mind map/flowchart features.

enriched_apps.name: Loom
enriched_apps.capabilities: SDKs for video recording, previewing, embedding with oembed metadata, GIF embeds, and link replacement.

enriched_apps.name: ClickUp
enriched_apps.capabilities: Project management API for connecting systems, automating tasks, data synchronization, and custom integrations.

enriched_apps.name: Calendly
enriched_apps.capabilities: Three APIs: REST v2 for links/meetings/users, Embed API for iFrame integration, Webhook API for event notifications.

enriched_apps.name: Dropbox
enriched_apps.capabilities: HTTP API for file storage, sharing, previews, search, webhooks, metadata, and team management.

enriched_apps.name: Box
enriched_apps.capabilities: Content API for retrieving, creating, managing content with AI integration, workflow automation, and Doc Gen.
